languages.text: {n}Лария коротко кивает, приглашая говорить дальше, и сосредотачивает все внимание на вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Лария коротко кивает, приглашая говорить дальше, и сосредотачивает все внимание на вас.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лария коротко кивает, приглашая говорить дальше, и сосредотачивает все внимание на вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

{n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅迅速点了点头，示意你继续说下去，并全神贯注地听着。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅迅速点了点头，示意你继续说下去，并全神贯注地听着。{/n}

languages.text: {n}D'un bref hochement de tête, Laria vous indique qu'elle est tout ouïe et vous invite à parler.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}D'un bref hochement de tête, Laria vous indique qu'elle est tout ouïe et vous invite à parler.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria, konuşmanı teşvik edercesine başıyla hızlıca onaylıyor ve tüm dikkatini sana veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, konuşmanı teşvik edercesine başıyla hızlıca onaylıyor ve tüm dikkatini sana veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria asiente rápidamente, invitándote a seguir hablando, y te dedica toda su atención.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria asiente rápidamente, invitándote a seguir hablando, y te dedica toda su atención.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria nickt schnell und lädt dich ein, weiterzusprechen. Du hast ihre volle Aufmerksamkeit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria nickt schnell und lädt dich ein, weiterzusprechen. Du hast ihre volle Aufmerksamkeit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアは頷き、話を続けるよう促す。そして、あなたの話を真剣に聞く。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria nods quickly, inviting you to speak further, and gives you her complete attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアは頷き、話を続けるよう促す。そして、あなたの話を真剣に聞く。{/n}
